core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine high-end jewelry presentation (deep backgrounds, glossy reflections) with the bouncy, tactile joy of casual gaming.
Emotion First: Create the feeling of 'unearthing treasure' with glowing high-contrast elements and soft magical backgrounds.
Focus on the Board: UI surrounding the game board must recede. The gems are the heroes.
Tactile Delight: Buttons shouldn't just be clicked; they should feel like they are being 'pressed' and 'popped'.

colors.surface_glass: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] backdrop-saturate-150

scales.h1_title: text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight text-white drop-shadow-lg

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense) for the Game Board to ensure perfect alignment. Tetris Grid (Asymmetric) for the Main Menu and Shop to create visual excitement.
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Generous spacing around menus: p-6 or p-8. Game board should be perfectly centered with tight internal padding (p-2) to maximize gem size.

surfaces.header_hud: Glassmorphism (Crystal variant) sticky at the top, highly saturated backdrop blur.
surfaces.game_board_wrapper: Flat solid background (bg-black/40) with a glowing border (border-white/10) to separate it from the magical background image.
surfaces.modals: Neumorphic tactile variant, soft drop shadows and sharp 1px inner highlights. Never use generic white cards.

components.buttons: Heavy, chunky buttons with bottom borders (e.g., border-b-4 border-amber-600) to create a 3D press effect. On active/click, remove the bottom border and translate down (translate-y-1).
components.gems: Use pure CSS and standard icons if images are unavailable. Create 3D gems using a radial gradient background, a hard inner light reflection (inset shadow), and an external glow.
components.score_display: Retro-Futurism style terminal block. Monospace font with a slight neon glow effect to make the numbers pop.
components.game_over_screen: Use a heavy black/70 overlay to fade out the board. Present a large, bouncy modal with the score and options to restart or go to main menu.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All buttons must brighten and lift slightly. Gems should pulse on hover.
motion_and_interaction.match_animation: When gems match, they should briefly scale up (scale-110), increase in brightness, and then fade out quickly. (Main agent must implement logic for this).
motion_and_interaction.board_entrance: Staggered fade-in of the gems when the level loads.
motion_and_interaction.feedback: Haptic/Visual feedback is critical. Implement screen shake (subtle CSS translate) on large combos if possible.

assets_and_media.icon_library: lucide-react for standard UI (Settings, X, Menu). Standard SVG shapes for gems (Diamond, Circle, Square, Hexagon, Star).

image_urls.description: Magical dark forest night with glowing fireflies, used as the immersive app background behind the glass UI.
Gold coin stack for the shop background or icon texture.
Reference for creating the glowing, glossy CSS gem assets.

testing_attributes: All interactive elements (Gems, CTAs, Power-ups, Shop Items, Modals) must include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='gem-cell-0-0', data-testid='buy-powerup-button', data-testid='lives-display'.
instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI in React using standard HTML/Tailwind for the heavy game board logic and layout.
Use Framer Motion to handle the gem swapping and grid falling animations. This is CRITICAL for a match-3 game.

Instead of flat colored squares, create highly stylized 3D CSS gems. Use `bg-gradient-to-br` with an inset shadow (`shadow-[inset_0_4px_4px_rgba(255,255,255,0.4)]`) and rounded corners to simulate glossy jewels.
Implement the 'Glassmorphism' style for the top HUD (lives, coins, score) so the magical forest background bleeds through.
Ensure the game board is a strict, responsive grid (e.g., 8x8) using CSS grid. Set `touch-action: none` on the board to handle swipe gestures natively.
Shop and Daily Rewards should use Shadcn Dialog components, heavily restyled to fit the 'Neumorphic tactile' dark theme with bright yellow CTAs.
